summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ranjana Yoga Studio website hero section redesign. All major features working perfectly including 3-layer parallax effect, context-aware navbar, and full site navigation.
passed_tests: Homepage hero section loads with yoga figure image and 3-layer parallax effect
Hero text 'Start Your Journey to Inner Peace' visible with 'Journey' in blush pink color (rgb(242, 196, 206))
Hero CTA buttons 'Explore Classes' and 'Book a Free Trial' are visible and clickable
Navigation links work correctly for all 6 pages (Home, About, Services, Schedule, Gallery, Contact)
Navbar text is ivory/light on dark hero background and changes to charcoal on scroll
Dark-to-ivory gradient transition at bottom of hero works smoothly
All homepage sections render correctly: Stats, Services Overview, Weight Loss, Why Us, Testimonials, CTA Banner, Gallery Strip
About page, Services page, Schedule page, Gallery page, Contact page all load correctly
Mobile hamburger menu works and navigation functions correctly
Contact form is present with proper validation and field handling
Navbar context-aware behavior: transparent with ivory text on hero, light background with dark text on scroll
3-layer parallax effect working with background decorative elements, centered yoga figure, and foreground text
